title: Plaudits for logits in sensory neuroscience.
author_string: Ryu, Joshua J H, Gardner, Justin L
abstract: A workhorse tool of economic decision-making has long sought to get inside people's heads through careful examination of their choices. In this issue of Neuron, Carandini<sup>1</sup> flips the script, showing how it can model how the brain makes sensory choices.
